query: List the five municipalities in Finnmark county with the highest number of buildings in 200-year flood zones, sorted by count descending.

1.description: Get Finnmark county geometry and kommunenummer list

3.description: Get 200-year flood zones for Finnmark municipalities

5.description: Count buildings in flood zones per municipality

6.description: Sort municipalities by building count descending

executions.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    public.kommuner
WHERE
    fylkesnummer = '54';
